CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value STRING);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'value2'), (3, NULL), (4, 'value4');
SELECT id, ifnull(value, 'default_value') AS value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, ifnull(NULL, 'fallback_value') AS value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, ifnull(value, CONCAT('default_', id)) AS value FROM test_table;
SELECT t.id, ifnull(t.value, d.default_value) AS value FROM test_table t JOIN default_table d ON t.id = d.rowid;
SELECT id, ifnull((SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 5), 'no_value_found') AS value FROM (SELECT 1 AS id);
SELECT id, ifnull(value, 'no_value') AS value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL) AS sub;

SELECT t1.id, ifnull(t1.value, t2.alt_value) AS final_value FROM test_table t1 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT id AS alt_id, 'alternate_value' AS alt_value FROM test_table WHERE id > 2) t2 ON t1.id = t2.alt_id;
SELECT ifnull((SELECT info FROM another_table LIMIT 1), 'no_info') AS result;
